b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Vector & Retrieval Weights"}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne uses hybrid scoring (vector + FTS5 + importance) for recall. These weights are configurable and auto-normalized per query."}]
d:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_VEC_TYPE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"int8"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Vector quantization: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"float32"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"int8"}],", or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"bit"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_VEC_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.5"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector similarity weight in hybrid scoring"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_FTS_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.3"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"FTS5 text relevance weight"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_IMPORTANCE_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.2"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Importance score weight"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TEMPORAL_HALFLIFE_HOURS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"24"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Temporal boost half-life in hours"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_BEAM_OPTIMIZATIONS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable BEAM benchmark optimizations (OR semantics, larger scans)"}]]}]]}]]}]
e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Tiered Degradation"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":"Episodic memories degrade through 3 tiers over time. Tier 1 is full content, Tier 2 is LLM-summarized, Tier 3 is entity-extracted compressed signal."}]
10:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER2_DAYS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"30"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Days before Tier 1 degrades to Tier 2"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_DAYS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"180"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Days before Tier 2 degrades to Tier 3"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER1_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"1.0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall memories per degradation cycle"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SMART_COMPRESS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"true"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable entity-aware sentence extraction for Tier 3"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_MAX_CHARS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"300"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Max characters for Tier 3 compressed content"}]]}]]}]]}]
11:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Veracity Weights"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":"Memories carry veracity labels that affect their recall weight. These multipliers tune how strongly each veracity level influences retrieval."}]
13:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_STATED_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"1.0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for explicitly stated facts"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_INFERRED_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.7"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for inferred facts"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TOOL_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.5"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for tool-generated output"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_IMPORTED_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.6"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for imported facts"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_UNKNOWN_WEIGHT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.8"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recall multiplier for uncategorized/legacy facts"}]]}]]}]]}]
14:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Embeddings"}]
15:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]," via fastembed (384 dimensions, local ONNX) for embedding generation. No external API key is needed."]}]

17:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Local LLM (Sleep Summarization)"}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":"The sleep/consolidation cycle can use a local or remote LLM to summarize grouped working memories before promoting them to episodic memory."}]
19:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_ENABLED"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"true"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable sleep"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_BASE_URL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"OpenAI-compatible window size for the local model filename"}]]}]]}]]}]
1a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Host LLM Backend (Hermes Integration)"}]
1b:["$","p",null,{"children":"When running inside Hermes, the host agent can provide an LLM backend for consolidation — avoiding duplicate API calls."}]
1c:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_ENABLED"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Route LLM calls through Hermes' authenticated client"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_PROVIDER"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Provider name override (e.g. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"openai-codex"}],")"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_MODEL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Model name override"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_N_CTX"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"32000"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Prompt context budget for host LLM path"}]]}]]}]]}]
1d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Multi-Agent Identity"}]
1e:["$","p",null,{"children":"Filter memories by author and channel for multi-agent or multi-tenant deployments."}]
1f:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTHOR_ID"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Default author identifier"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTHOR_TYPE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Author category: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"human"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"agent"}],", or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"system"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_CHANNEL_ID"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Default channel identifier for cross-session memory"}]]}]]}]]}]
20:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Auto-Sleep & SHMR"}]
21:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_SLEEP_ENABLED"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable auto-sleep after N turns"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_BATCH_SIZE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"50"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SHMR batch size for harmony cycles"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_MAX_ITERATIONS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"3"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SHMR max iterations per cluster"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_SIMILARITY_THRESHOLD"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.70"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SHMR cosine similarity threshold"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SHMR_HARMONY_THRESHOLD"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.60"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SHMR harmony score threshold"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LOG_TOOLS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Opt-in tool call logging in hermes_plugin"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_MCP_BANK"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"default"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Default bank for MCP server"}]]}]]}]]}]
22:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"YAML Configuration"}]
23:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne integrates with the Hermes ",["$","code",null,{"children":"config.yaml"}]," file (not a standalone ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne.yaml"}],"). Configure settings under the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memory.mnemosyne"}]," key:"]}]
24:["$","$L32",null,{"code":"# config.yaml (Hermes project root)\nmemory:\nmnemosyne:\n  # Auto-sleep consolidation\n  auto_sleep: false             # Auto-run sleep() when working memory exceeds threshold\n  sleep_threshold: 50           # Working memory count before auto-sleep triggers\n\n  # Vector configuration\n  vector_type: int8             # Quantization: float32, int8, or bit\n\n  # Pattern filtering\n  ignore_patterns:              # Content patterns to skip during remember()\n    - \"be ACTIVE\"               # Skill refinement boilerplate\n    - \"nothing to change\"       # No-op responses\n    - \"skill.*refined\"          # Wildcard match\n","language":"yaml"}]
25:["$","p",null,{"children":"Config file lookup order (first found wins):"}]
26:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"./config.yaml"}]," (current working directory)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/mnemosyne/config.yaml"}]," (user-level)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Environment variables (fallback for any setting not in config.yaml)"}],"\n"]}]
27:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Programmatic Configuration"}]
28:["$","p",null,{"children":["No config file is needed. You can create a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}]," instance directly in Python:"]}]
29:["$","$L32",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(\n  session_id=\"my-agent\",        # Scope working memories to this session\n  db_path=\"./my-memory.db\",     # Custom SQLite database path (optional)\n  bank=\"work\",                  # Named memory bank for isolation\n  author_id=\"alice\",            # Multi-agent identity\n  author_type=\"human\",          # \"human\", \"agent\", or \"system\"\n  channel_id=\"team-slack\",      # Cross-session channel\n)\n","language":"python"}]
2a:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Parameter"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\"default\""}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Session identifier for scoping working memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"db_path"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str | | None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Channel identifier for cross-session shared memory"}]]}]]}]]}]
2b:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L33",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Local-first by default"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne requires no external API keys for basic usage. Embeddings use ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]," via fastembed (384-dimensional, local ONNX runtime). The sleep/consolidation cycle defaults to a local TinyLlama GGUF model. You only need API keys if you configure a remote LLM endpoint via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_BASE_URL"}],"."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
